raw_text: Contact us at support@example.com for help.
expected_behavior: Email address replaced with <EMAIL> token

raw_text: Visit https://www.gnu.org/philosophy/philosophy.html for more info.
expected_behavior: URL replaced with <URL> token

raw_text: Call me at 555-867-5309 if you have questions.
expected_behavior: Phone number replaced with <PHONE> token

raw_text:
From: jsmith@mit.edu (John Smith)
Subject: Re: question about circuits

Here is the actual message body.
expected_behavior: Header lines (From:, Subject:) removed; only body remains

raw_text:
>In article <1993Apr17.122329@monash.edu>
>darice@monash.edu (Fred Rice) writes:
>
>Some quoted text here.

My reply to the above.
expected_behavior: All lines starting with > are removed; only the reply remains

raw_text:
This is the main message.

--
John Smith
jsmith@example.com
555-123-4567
expected_behavior: Signature block after '-- ' is removed

raw_text: Mr. Smith said the component costs about $5. He recommended buying in bulk.
expected_behavior: Sentence not split after 'Mr.' — one or two sentences, not splitting at abbreviation

raw_text: Dr. Jones is a professor at MIT. She teaches electronics.
expected_behavior: Sentence not split after 'Dr.' — correctly tokenized into two sentences

raw_text: Use a 10k resistor, etc. and connect it to ground.
expected_behavior: Sentence not split after 'etc.' — remains one sentence

raw_text: For example, e.g. a 555 timer can be used. It is very versatile.
expected_behavior: Sentence not split after 'e.g.' — two sentences split only at the period after 'used'

raw_text: This is firmware version 1.2.3 of the controller.
expected_behavior: No sentence split at '1.2.3' — version number preserved intact

raw_text: The resistance value is 3.14 ohms. Connect it in series.
expected_behavior: No sentence split at '3.14' — decimal number preserved; two sentences split at end of first

raw_text: He said “I believe in God” and left the room.
expected_behavior: Curly double quotes normalized to straight quotes: "I believe in God"

raw_text: It’s a well-known fact that atheism isn’t a religion.
expected_behavior: Curly right apostrophes (\u2019) normalized to straight apostrophe (')

raw_text: The transistor—a bipolar junction type—was invented in 1947.
expected_behavior: Em-dash (\u2014) replaced with double hyphen (--)

raw_text: See the attached schematic for details.
expected_behavior: Non-breaking spaces (\u00a0) replaced with regular spaces

raw_text: The answer is 42… or is it?
expected_behavior: Unicode ellipsis (\u2026) replaced with three dots (...)

raw_text: The price is <$100 & shipping is free.
expected_behavior: HTML entities decoded: < → < and & → &

raw_text: Important: Read the manual first.
expected_behavior: HTML tags stripped; plain text 'Important: Read the  manual  first.' remains

raw_text: This   has    extra   spaces		and	tabs.
expected_behavior: Multiple spaces and tabs collapsed to single space

raw_text:
First paragraph.




Second paragraph after many blank lines.
expected_behavior: More than 2 consecutive blank lines collapsed to 2
Empty string input returns empty string (no crash)
Whitespace-only input returns empty string after clean_text

raw_text: I sеe you usеd a Cyrіllic 'e' and 'i' in this еnglish tеxt.
expected_behavior: Cyrillic homoglyphs (\u0435=е, \u0456=і) replaced with Latin equivalents

raw_text:
In article <1993Apr17.122329.21438@monu6.cc.monash.edu.au> darice@yoyo.cc.monash.edu.au (Fred Rice) writes:

Here is my actual question about transistors.
expected_behavior: 'In article <...>' citation header removed; actual question preserved

raw_text: Call 1-800-555-0199 or email help@service.org or visit www.example.com today.
expected_behavior: Phone → <PHONE>, email → <EMAIL>, URL → <URL>; all three masked in one text

raw_text: The i.e. abbreviation means 'that is'. It is often misused.
expected_behavior: Sentence not split after 'i.e.' — period is part of abbreviation

raw_text: GOD EXISTS AND SCIENCE IS WRONG!!!
expected_behavior: All-caps text preserved as-is (casing not modified by pipeline)

raw_text: The voltage is 5V–12V (depending on the regulator).
expected_behavior: En-dash (\u2013) replaced with single hyphen: '5V-12V'
